info.title: Jeevanti Hospitals Management System API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for the Jeevanti Hospitals Management System (HMS) built with Next.js, Prisma, MongoDB, and NextAuth.

get.description: Retrieve a list of patients with search filtering on UHID, mobile, or name.

post.description: Registers a new patient and generates a unique UHID.

409.description: Conflict - Patient already exists with this mobile number

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific patient including appointments, consultations, admissions, lab orders, and invoices.
Retrieves appointments matching optional filters: status, date, or doctorId.

post.description: Books a new appointment and assigns a sequential token number.

409.description: Conflict - Time slot is already booked for this doctor

put.description: Updates an appointment's date, time, status, doctor, or department. Validates time slot availability.

409.description: Conflict - New time slot is already booked

post.description: Records clinical consultation (OPD) and updates appointment status to completed.
Creates a patient prescription with medicines list.

get.description: Retrieves a list of inpatient admissions. Optional filter by status.

post.description: Creates an inpatient admission and marks bed status as occupied.

put.description: If body status is 'discharged', executes discharge process, sets bed status to available, adds/updates IPD invoice. Otherwise, updates admission details (doctor, ward, room, bed).

200.description: Admission updated or patient discharged successfully

post.description: Creates a new daily round record with vitals and doctor clinical notes.
Creates a custom invoice with a set of line items.

put.description: Updates subtotal, tax, discount, total or status of an invoice.

post.description: Auto-generates an invoice for an OPD consultation based on consultation fees, prescribed medicines, and ordered lab tests.
Auto-generates/updates invoice for inpatient stay including room charges, lab tests, and additional services.
Records a payment transaction against an invoice and updates invoice status (pending -> partial -> paid).

201.description: Lab report uploaded and order status updated to completed

delete.description: Deletes a ward and all associated rooms and beds.

post.description: Creates a room under a ward and optionally auto-creates associated beds.
Note: Registered under the details path in codebase. roomId and bedNumber are specified in body.

400.description: Bad Request - E.g. Cannot delete occupied bed
Bad Request - E.g. Cannot delete super admin

get.description: Returns statistics summary for today's appointments, admitted patients, occupied beds, pending bills, recent activities, and doctor lists.
Retrieves analytical reports of types: daily, monthly, revenue, doctor-performance, or bed-occupancy.

parameters.name: doctorId
parameters.description: Doctor ID filter for doctor performance report

200.description: Successful response based on report type
